subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and God of all the world, my Creator and Creator of the nations! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و اله العالم و موجدی و موجد الامم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for teaching, @Greatest Name, @praise and encouragement
